name: Jete Power Holdings Limited
summary: Jete Power Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs, develops, manufactures, and sells cast metal products in Germany, Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, the United States, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Metal Casting, Financial Printing, and Entertainment. The company provides pump, filter, valve, and food machinery components made from stainless steel, carbon steel, bronze, and/or grey iron. It serves suppliers of flow control devices, electromechanical equipment, and industrial machinery and equipment. The company is also involved in the provision of the financial printing, typesetting, and translation services; and organizing concerts and events. Jete Power Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
